training_status: resistance training multiple times per week

compounds.frequency: twice daily (morning on empty stomach, before bed on empty stomach)

benefits.description: Fragment 176-191 peptide used for fat loss on empty stomach
Ipamorelin or Sermorelin for recovery support

protocol_notes: User recommends walking 10k steps daily, lifting heavy weights, 200g protein per day. Fragment 176-191 on empty stomach in AM followed by 30g protein 30-60 min later, then again on empty stomach before bed. Ipamorelin or Sermorelin chosen based on availability and price. User advises against expensive peptides until establishing serious habit and progressive overload.
